const report = $input.first().json;
return {campaignComplete: true, totalLeads: report.campaign.total, won: report.campaign.statuses.WON, conversionRate: report.campaign.funnel[4].pct + '%', activeRate: report.campaign.activeRate + '%', nextCheck: new Date(Date.now() + 6*60*60*1000).toISOString()};
